nasb.text: You shall prepare the roads for yourself, and divide into three parts the territory of your land which the Lord your God will give you as a possession, so that any manslayer may flee there.

esv.text: You shall measure the distances and divide into three parts the area of the land that the Lord your God gives you as a possession, so that any manslayer can flee to them.

cnv.text: 你要為自己預備道路，又要把耶和華你的　神給你作產業的地分為三區，使誤殺人的可以逃到那裡去。
